item.name: False Shaded Spectacles
item.description: These tinted lenses will place you at the forefront of trendiness─so long as you avoid bumping into anything while wearing them. Though these were once considered a fashion accessory, trends are ever changing, and style enthusiasts now classify them as facewear. Use to unlock shaded spectacles.

ornament.name: False Shaded Spectacles
ornament.description: Don a pair of tinted lenses and try not to bump into anything.
